text.title: SSH Hardening Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is sshd reachable from the public internet?

branch.question: Can the operator open a parallel terminal RIGHT NOW?

text.example: Hetzner cx22 with sshd on 22022, operator opens second tmux pane → run procedure end-to-end.
